_readme:
One entry per project, in display order. Run: node build-portfolio.js. Images must exist in images/ named shaynesdesigns-shaynes-designs-portfolio--fullpage-top.jpg, -fullpage-bottom.jpg, -fullpage.jpg, -shot-hero.jpg, -shot-content.jpg, -hero.webp. Set any image field to override the convention. nameHtml may contain
. accent = brand colour, accentText = text colour on accent buttons, overlay = CSS gradient over the bg image.

projects.desc: 16+ years of lived experience distilled into a comprehensive expat resource. Visa guides, neighbourhood breakdowns, cost of living data, community events, and practical guides for people making Chiang Mai home. Built for speed and depth — a content site that actually ranks.
